---
title: "UIAO OrgPath Codebook"
subtitle: "Schema Reference · codebook.schema.json"
date: 2026-05-14
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Developer Reference

This is a UIAO JSON Schema, rendered as a developer-reference page per
[ADR-072](../../adr/adr-072-canon-publication-policy.qmd).

- **Source:** [`src/uiao/schemas/orgpath/codebook.schema.json`](../../../src/uiao/schemas/orgpath/codebook.schema.json)
- **Dialect:** `https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema`
- **`$id`:** `https://uiao.io/schemas/orgpath/codebook.schema.json`
:::

## Description

Machine-readable enumeration of canonical OrgPath codes. Bound to UIAO_151 (src/uiao/canon/UIAO_151_OrgPath_Codebook.md) by ADR-035. Every OrgPath value appearing in Entra extensionAttribute1 must resolve to `codes[].code` or it is classified as Value Drift (DRIFT-SEMANTIC).

## Top-Level Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|:---:|---|
| `schema_version` | string | ✓ |  |
| `document_id` | `const: 'UIAO_151'` | ✓ |  |
| `parent_canon` | string | ✓ |  |
| `updated` | string |  |  |
| `format` | object | ✓ |  |
| `codes` | array&lt;`$ref: #/$defs/code`&gt; | ✓ |  |
| `deprecated` | array&lt;`$ref: #/$defs/deprecatedCode`&gt; |  |  |

## Full Schema

```{.json filename="codebook.schema.json"}
{
  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
  "$id": "https://uiao.io/schemas/orgpath/codebook.schema.json",
  "title": "UIAO OrgPath Codebook",
  "description": "Machine-readable enumeration of canonical OrgPath codes. Bound to UIAO_151 (src/uiao/canon/UIAO_151_OrgPath_Codebook.md) by ADR-035. Every OrgPath value appearing in Entra extensionAttribute1 must resolve to `codes[].code` or it is classified as Value Drift (DRIFT-SEMANTIC).",
  "type": "object",
  "additionalProperties": false,
  "required": [
    "schema_version",
    "document_id",
    "parent_canon",
    "format",
    "codes"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "schema_version": {
      "type": "string",
      "pattern": "^[0-9]+\\.[0-9]+\\.[0-9]+$"
    },
    "document_id": {
      "const": "UIAO_151"
    },
    "parent_canon": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "updated": {
      "type": "string",
      "format": "date"
    },
    "format": {
      "type": "object",
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "required": [
        "regex",
        "max_depth",
        "segment_pattern",
        "root",
        "separator"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "regex": {
          "const": "^ORG(-[A-Z0-9]{2,6}){0,8}$"
        },
        "max_depth": {
          "const": 8
        },
        "segment_pattern": {
          "const": "^[A-Z0-9]{2,6}$"
        },
        "root": {
          "const": "ORG"
        },
        "separator": {
          "const": "-"
        }
      }
    },
    "codes": {
      "type": "array",
      "minItems": 1,
      "uniqueItems": true,
      "items": {
        "$ref": "#/$defs/code"
      }
    },
    "deprecated": {
      "type": "array",
      "default": [],
      "items": {
        "$ref": "#/$defs/deprecatedCode"
      }
    }
  },
  "$defs": {
    "code": {
      "type": "object",
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "required": [
        "code",
        "level",
        "description",
        "parent"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "code": {
          "type": "string",
          "pattern": "^ORG(-[A-Z0-9]{2,6}){0,8}$"
        },
        "level": {
          "type": "integer",
          "minimum": 0,
          "maximum": 8
        },
        "description": {
          "type": "string",
          "minLength": 1
        },
        "parent": {
          "oneOf": [
            {
              "type": "null"
            },
            {
              "type": "string",
              "pattern": "^ORG(-[A-Z0-9]{2,6}){0,8}$"
            }
          ]
        }
      }
    },
    "deprecatedCode": {
      "type": "object",
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "required": [
        "code",
        "replaced_by"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "code": {
          "type": "string",
          "pattern": "^ORG(-[A-Z0-9]{2,6}){0,8}$"
        },
        "replaced_by": {
          "type": "string",
          "pattern": "^ORG(-[A-Z0-9]{2,6}){0,8}$"
        },
        "deprecated_at": {
          "type": "string",
          "format": "date"
        },
        "reason": {
          "type": "string"
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
```
